case_title: BAY AREA COATINGS VS KAWAGUCHI MARI A.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KAWAGUCHI MARI A. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BAY AREA COATINGS $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $16.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,016.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY BAY AREA COATINGS AS TO DEFENDANT KAWAGUCHI MARI A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-24-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY AREA COATINGS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAWAGUCHI MARI A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAWAGUCHI MARI A.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KAWAGUCHI MARI A. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BAY AREA COATINGS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BAY AREA COATINGS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-26-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF BAY AREA COATINGS
